channel.title: Smit Parekh - Digital Marketing & Full-stack Developer
channel.description: Professional portfolio of Smit Parekh featuring web development, digital marketing expertise, SEO services, and free online tools.

item.title: Smit Parekh - Digital Marketing & Full-stack Developer
item.description: Welcome to Smit Parekh's portfolio. Discover my skills in digital marketing, web development, SEO, and video editing. Explore my projects and services that can elevate your brand's online presence.

item.title: About - Software Developer & SEO Specialist | Smit Parekh
item.description: Discover Smit Parekh, a Software Developer & SEO Specialist with over 3 years of experience, 10+ certifications, and a blend of strategic, creative, and technical skills.

item.title: Professional Skills & Expertise | Smit Parekh
item.description: Explore Smit Parekh's comprehensive skill set spanning Web Development (JavaScript, React.js, Node.js), Digital Marketing (SEO, Social Media) and Creative Design (UI/UX, Video Editing).

item.title: Qualifications & Experience | Smit Parekh
item.description: Discover Smit Parekh's qualifications, including a Master's and Bachelor's in Information Technology from Charusat University, and experience as a Marketing Manager, Node.js Developer, and Video Editor.

item.title: Professional Services | Smit Parekh
item.description: Explore professional services by Smit Parekh, including Full Stack Web Development, SEO Optimization, Digital Marketing Strategy, Social Media Marketing, Video Editing, and Graphic Design.

item.title: Portfolio | Smit Parekh
item.description: Explore the diverse portfolio of Smit Parekh, showcasing projects in SEO Optimization, Digital Marketing, Web Development, Video Editing, and Graphic Design.

item.title: Projects Gallery | Smit Parekh
item.description: Browse through Smit Parekh's collection of web development and digital marketing projects showcasing expertise in various technologies and industries.

item.title: Client Testimonials | Smit Parekh
item.description: Read what clients say about Smit Parekh's web development and digital marketing services. Discover how his expertise has transformed businesses.

item.title: Contact Smit Parekh
item.description: Get in touch with Smit Parekh for professional web development, digital marketing, and SEO services. Receive a personalized consultation for your business needs.

item.title: Free Online Tools | Smit Parekh
item.description: Access powerful, free online tools including AI-powered LinkedIn Post Generator, Background Remover, and Meta Tag Checker. Boost productivity with no cost.

item.title: Free Background Remover Tool
item.description: Remove image backgrounds in seconds with our free online tool. Get transparent PNG files with perfect edge detection for product photos, portraits, and graphics without any cost.

item.title: Free AI LinkedIn Post Generator
item.description: Generate engaging, viral-worthy LinkedIn posts with our free AI tool. Save time, increase engagement, and grow your professional network with compelling content created in seconds.

item.title: Free Meta Tag Checker Tool
item.description: Instantly analyze your website's meta tags, Open Graph tags, and Twitter Cards with our free Meta Tag Checker. Improve your SEO and social media presence with actionable insights.

item.title: Free QR Code Generator Tool
item.description: Create custom QR codes instantly with our free online generator. Download high-resolution QR codes for your website, business cards, marketing materials, or contact information.

item.title: Free Image Compression Tool
item.description: Compress your images without losing quality using our free online image compression tool. Optimize images for faster website loading and better user experience.

item.title: Free Image Format Converter Tool
item.description: Convert images between multiple formats including JPG, PNG, WEBP, and more with our free online tool. No signup required, instant conversions with original quality preservation.

item.title: Free SEO Analyzer Tool
item.description: Analyze your website's SEO performance with our free SEO Analyzer tool. Get actionable recommendations to improve your search engine ranking and visibility.

item.title: Smit Parekh's CV
item.description: View the professional CV of Smit Parekh, Software Developer and SEO Specialist with experience in web development, SEO, and digital marketing.
